title: Maruti Suzuki India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Maruti Suzuki India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India:
Maruti Suzuki India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
